ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectral_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral data point */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the spectral data point */,
  "R" REAL /* Red channel value (R) */,
  "G" REAL /* Green channel value (G) */,
  "B" REAL /* Blue channel value (B) */,
  "A" REAL /* Alpha channel value (A) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset this data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of data collection */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (raw, processed, validated) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., laboratory, satellite, environmental sensor) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "dataset_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (in use, maintenance, calibrated) */,
  "calibration_certificate" TEXT /* Reference to the calibration certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Secure hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., location, conditions) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., environmental, technical) */,
  "metadata_units" TEXT /* Units of the metadata value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization is based on */,
  "vis_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph, heatmap) */,
  "vis_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (draft, final, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the data */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of the shared item (e.g., dataset, visualization) */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share (pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., SNR, resolution) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was validated */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_units" TEXT /* Units of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)
